message:
feat(conformance): add traceability matrix scanner and report generator

Implement spec-to-test traceability tooling:

traceability.rs (+418 lines):
- SpecRequirement struct for parsing specification requirements JSON
- TraceabilityEntry for parsed #[conformance] attributes from source
- TraceabilityMatrix aggregates entries with coverage statistics
- scan_conformance_attributes() scans Rust files for #[conformance(...)]
  using regex-based extraction (no syn dependency for speed)
- requirements_from_entries() deduplicates and sorts requirements
- Coverage calculation: total, covered, missing, percentage
- ScanWarning for parse issues without failing the whole scan
- TraceabilityScanError for fatal scan failures

lib.rs:
- Re-export traceability module types and functions

Matrix output includes:
- Per-requirement coverage status (covered/missing)
- Test locations (file:line) for each requirement
- Overall coverage percentage
- List of requirements without test coverage

Enables CI integration with --min-coverage and --fail-on-missing flags
in the asupersync CLI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
